chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 2047 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 12.09.2019 For orders on office objection For hearing of MA 7954/19 For hearing of main case None present for petitioners Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl.A.G. along with Insp. Sohail Sarwar Jamali for SSP Hyderabad, ASI Ghulam Shabbir Magsi for SHO PS Tando Jam and ASI Muhammad Yaqoob Soomro, PS Naushahro Feroze. No one is present on behalf of petitioners. Learned A.A.G. has filed comments on behalf of respondents 3 to 5. I.O of the case is also present and submits that after due investigation the subject FIR has been disposed of under ‘B’ class as it was lodged by the complainant due to acrimony against petitioner No.1 Mst. Bibi Asma his ex wife whom he had divorced. Accordingly, this petition having served its purpose is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
